natural_strengths: Inspiring extraordinary performance through personal example
Identifying and attacking the decisive point in any competition
Integrating the strengths of acquired organizations
Turning momentum into a compounding strategic advantage
natural_weaknesses: Cannot recognize when consolidation is more valuable than expansion
Personal risk-taking that endangers organizational continuity
Burns out teams by refusing to slow down after victories
Overreliance on personal charisma over institutional systems
communication_style: Charismatic and action-oriented. Leads by example rather than explanation. Short on analysis, long on inspiration. Every message is a call to advance.
one_liner: There is nothing impossible to him who will try.
